meta.title: Future Airman - Where are you trying to go?
meta.description:
The Air Force does not care about who you are or where you come from. It cares about your effort and where you are trying to go.

It provides you all the resources you will require to succeed such as education and discipline. The Air Force only accepts the best and will offer you all of the opportunities you could desire. If you are willing to work hard, you will succeed.

Are you or a loved one about to become the future of the Air Force?

Stay connected at every step of the Air Force journey as well as getting training advice every week with the Sandboxx app: https://link.sandboxx.us/youtube
